features: Removed public Legacy Dispatch login option
Normalized legacy admin/dispatch users to Platform Admin in the marketplace UI
Platform Admin is the Co Pilot marketplace owner/operator role
Agency Admin is the licensed security company role that accepts and manages jobs
Renamed Agency Dispatch UI to Agency Job Management
Platform Admin no longer sees legacy dispatch-board or pending-dispatch navigation
Accepted marketplace jobs remain locked to the accepting agency
Agency assigns its own guards after accepting open marketplace jobs
Preserves v4.0.3 client service-location capture and agency guard assignment
